name: BK RAKYA.IND.AGRONI.RP100
summary: BK RAKYA.IND.AGRONI.RP100 is likely referring to PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk, one of the largest banks in Indonesia. The bank focuses on providing financial services to micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises (MSMEs). Bank Rakyat Indonesia has a vast network of branches and ATMs across Indonesia.
